/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g CMakeFiles/voxfall_tests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxfall_tests.dir/tests/test_world.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxfall_tests.dir/tests/test_vehicle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxfall_tests.dir/tests/test_locomotion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxfall_tests.dir/tests/test_mapfile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxfall_tests.dir/tests/test_sim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxfall_tests.dir/tests/test_net.cpp.o -o voxfall_tests  libvoxfall_core.a
